name: Desktop Microphone - heyday™ Stone White: USB-C Condenser for PC
description:
This stylish Desktop Microphone from heyday™ offers easy, convenient functionality along with a look you'll love displaying on your desk. In a sleek stone white and metallic gold design, this desk microphone has an adjustable stand for hands-free use while you record audio, participate in video calls and more. A 6-foot USB-C to USB-A cable is included, and there's an aux port for headphone connection. Compatible with Mac and PC, this USB condenser mic is a great addition to your home office setup or your desktop creative space.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
